scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --prefix $npm_package_config_pkg && git add $npm_package_config_pkg/package.json && git commit -m "release patch" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./$npm_package_config_pkg/package.json').version") && git push origin master && git push origin --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --prefix $npm_package_config_pkg && git add $npm_package_config_pkg/package.json && git commit -m "release minor" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./$npm_package_config_pkg/package.json').version") && git push origin master && git push origin --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version --prefix $npm_package_config_pkg && git add $npm_package_config_pkg/package.json && git commit -m "release major" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./$npm_package_config_pkg/package.json').version") && git push origin master && git push origin --tags
